markdown:
#  View Change History for Specifications 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click the desired specification area you want to view the info for.   
OR  
Click **Info**![Icon Info3](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8daa3c2524fc6852f143ae85122ba667/6cc6417d2c59aeda0bd76d801eb8e870/icon-info3.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon next to a specification. 
  3. Click the **Change History** tab to view all the related information.


## See Also
  * [Specifications - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * [View Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-specifications)
  * [Move Specifications to Another Specification Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/move-spec-area)
title: View Change History for Specifications
description: How to view change history for specifications.
